title: The Latent Class Model
text: Latent Class Analysis assumes people belong different groups (.e., classes) due nonobservable characteristics. latent class model, aim estimate two kinds probabilities: probability person belongs particular class. conditional probabilities item responses person belongs given class.

title: The Latent Class Model
text: Suppose sample people respond JJ items рқҗІ\mathbf{y} vector contains scores item jj. Let KK denote number latent classes let xkx_k class kk. , likelihood response pattern рқҗІ\mathbf{y}, observed nn times sample every person responds independently , can written в„“=P(рқҗІ)n=(вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)P(рқҗІвҲЈxk))n. \ell \;=\; P(\mathbf{y})^{n} \;=\; \Bigg(\sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k)\, P(\mathbf{y}\mid x_k)\Bigg)^{n}. Assuming local independence (responses within person independent conditional class), P(рқҗІвҲЈxk)=вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxk), P(\mathbf{y}\mid x_k) \;=\; \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_k),  yjy_j denotes score item jj. Hence, в„“=(вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxk))n, \ell \;=\; \Bigg(\sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k)\, \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_k)\Bigg)^{\!n},  log-likelihood becomes в„“в„“=nlogвҒЎ(вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxk)). \ell\ell \;=\; n \log \Bigg(\sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k)\, \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_k)\Bigg).  term inside parenthesis probability single pattern, P(рқҗІ)P(\mathbf{y}). Assuming independence people different response patterns, log-likelihood whole sample sum log-likelihoods response pattern. simplify computation logarithm likelihood related derivatives, let lymвҲЈxg=logвҒЎP(ymвҲЈxg)l_{y_m \mid x_g} = \log P(y_m \mid x_g), в„“в„“=nlogвҒЎ(вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)expвҒЎ(вҲ‘j=1JlymвҲЈxg)). \ell\ell \;=\; n \log \Bigg(\sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k)\, \exp\bigg(\sum_{j=1}^{J} l_{y_m \mid x_g}\bigg)\Bigg).

title: The Latent Class Model
text: fixed pattern рқҗІ\mathbf{y}, define P(рқҗІ)=вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxk)=вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)expвҒЎ(вҲ‘j=1JlymвҲЈxg). \begin{aligned} P(\mathbf{y}) \;&=\; \sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k)\, \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_k) \\ &=\; \sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k)\, \exp\bigg(\sum_{j=1}^{J} l_{y_m \mid x_g}\bigg). \end{aligned}  вҲӮв„“в„“вҲӮP(xg)=n1P(рқҗІ)вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg). \frac{\partial \ell\ell}{\partial P(x_g)} \;=\; n \,\frac{1}{P(\mathbf{y})}\, \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g).  specific item mm class gg, вҲӮв„“в„“вҲӮlymвҲЈxg=n1P(рқҗІ)P(xg)вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg). \frac{\partial \ell\ell}{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}} \;=\; n \,\frac{1}{P(\mathbf{y})}\, P(x_g)\, \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g). Notice last expression just posterior, P(xgвҲЈym)P(x_g \mid y_m), weighted nn.

title: The Latent Class Model
text: d[вҲӮв„“в„“вҲӮP(xg)]=nP(рқҗІ)d[вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg)]вҲ’d[P(рқҗІ)]вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg)P(рқҗІ)2, d \Bigg[ \frac{\partial \ell\ell}{\partial P(x_g)} \Bigg] \;=\; n \,\frac{P(\mathbf{y}) \; d\big[\prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g)\big] - d\big[P(\mathbf{y})\big] \; \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g)}{P(\mathbf{y})^2},  d[вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg)]=вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg)P(yjвҲЈxg)d[P(yjвҲЈxg)], d\big[\prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g)\big] = \frac{\prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g)}{P(y_j \mid x_g) \, d\big[P(y_j \mid x_g)\big]},  d[P(рқҗІ)]=вҲ‘k=1Kd[P(xk)]вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxk)+вҲ‘k=1KP(xk)d[вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxk)]. d\big[P(\mathbf{y})\big] = \sum_{k=1}^{K} d\big[P(x_k)] \, \prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_k) + \sum_{k=1}^{K} P(x_k) \, d\big[\prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_k)].

title: The Latent Class Model
text: classes g,hg,h, вҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮP(xg)вҲӮP(xh)=вҲ’n1P(рқҗІ)2(вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxg))(вҲҸj=1JP(yjвҲЈxh))=вҲ’nP(xgвҲЈy)P(xhвҲЈy)P(xg)P(xh). \begin{aligned} \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial P(x_g)\,\partial P(x_h)} \;&=\; -\,n \,\frac{1}{P(\mathbf{y})^{2}} \, \Bigg(\prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_g)\Bigg)\! \Bigg(\prod_{j=1}^{J} P(y_j \mid x_h)\Bigg) \\ &=\; -n \frac{P(x_g \mid y) P(x_h \mid y)}{P(x_g) P(x_h)}. \end{aligned} items m,nm,n classes g,hg,h, вҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮlynвҲЈxh={nP(xgвҲЈy)(1вҲ’P(xgвҲЈy)),g=h,вҲ’nP(xgвҲЈy)P(xhвҲЈy),otherwise. \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}\,\partial l_{y_n \mid x_h}} = \begin{cases} \,n \, P(x_g \mid y) \!\ \big(1-P(x_g \mid y)\big), & \text{} \!\ g=h,\\[1.25em] -\,n \, P(x_g \mid y) \!\ P(x_h \mid y), & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} mixed second derivative, вҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮP(xh)вҲӮlymвҲЈxg={1P(xg)nP(xgвҲЈy)(1вҲ’P(xgвҲЈy)),g=h,вҲ’1P(xh)nP(xgвҲЈy)P(xhвҲЈy),otherwise. \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial P(x_h)\,\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}} = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{P(x_g)} \, n \, P(x_g \mid y) \big(1-P(x_g \mid y)\big), & \text{} g=h,\\[1.0em] -\, \frac{1}{P(x_h)} \, n \, P(x_g \mid y) P(x_h \mid y), & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} Collecting terms gives Hessian block form: Hess(в„“в„“)=[вҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮP(xg)вҲӮP(xh)вҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮP(xh)вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮP(xh)вҲӮ2в„“в„“вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮlymвҲЈxg]. \mathrm{Hess}(\ell\ell) \;=\; \begin{bmatrix} \displaystyle \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial P(x_g)\,\partial P(x_h)} & \displaystyle \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial P(x_h)\,\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}} \\[0.8em] \displaystyle \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}\,\partial P(x_h)} & \displaystyle \frac{\partial^2 \ell\ell}{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}\,\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}} \end{bmatrix}\!.

title: The Latent Class Model
text: conditional probabilities need parameterized likelihood. consider multinomial likelihood categorical items Gaussian likelihood continuous items. categorical items, let ПҖmkвҲЈg\pi_{m_k \mid g} probability scoring category kk item mm subject belongs class gg. P(ymвҲЈxg)=ПҖmkвҲЈg, P(y_m \mid x_g) \;=\; \pi_{m_k \mid g},  kk ym=ky_m = k. parameterization, вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮПҖnkвҲЈh={1ПҖnkвҲЈh,ym=k,m=n,g=h,0,otherwise. \frac{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \pi_{n_k \mid h}} = \begin{cases} \frac{1}{\pi_{n_k \mid h}}, & \text{} y_m = k,\ m=n,\ g=h,\\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases}  вҲӮ2lyjвҲЈxiвҲӮПҖmkвҲЈgвҲӮПҖnlвҲЈh={вҲ’1ПҖmjвҲЈi2,yj=k=l,y=m=n,=g=h,0,otherwise. \frac{\partial^2 l_{y_j \mid x_i}}{\partial \pi_{m_k \mid g} \partial \pi_{n_l \mid h}} = \begin{cases} -\frac{1}{\pi_{m_j \mid }^2}, & \text{} y_j = k = l,\ y=m=n,\ =g=h,\\ 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} Consequently, Hessian conditional parameter following block form: Hess(lymвҲЈxg)=рқҗһвҲӮ2lyjвҲЈxiвҲӮПҖmkвҲЈgвҲӮПҖnlвҲЈhрқҗһвҠӨ, \mathrm{Hess}(l_{y_m \mid x_g}) \;=\; \mathbf{e} \; \displaystyle \frac{\partial^2 l_{y_j \mid x_i}}{\partial \pi_{m_k \mid g} \partial \pi_{n_l \mid h}} \; \mathbf{e}^\top,  рқҗһ\mathbf{e} vector zeroes 1 position corresponding parameter ПҖyjвҲЈ\pi_{y_j \mid }. Notice conditional parameter lymвҲЈxgl_{y_m \mid x_g} Hessian matrix. continuous items, let ПҶ\varphi denote normal density. Let ОјmвҲЈg\mu_{m\mid g} ПғmвҲЈg\sigma_{m\mid g} mean standard deviation item mm class gg. P(ymвҲЈxg)=ПҶ(ym;ОјmвҲЈg,ПғmвҲЈg). P(y_m \mid x_g) \;=\; \varphi\!\big(y_m;\, \mu_{m\mid g},\, \sigma_{m\mid g}\big). First derivatives: вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮОјnвҲЈh={ymвҲ’ОјmвҲЈgПғmвҲЈg2,m=n,g=h,0,otherwise, \frac{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \mu_{n\mid h}} = \begin{cases} \dfrac{y_m - \mu_{m\mid g}}{\sigma_{m\mid g}^{2}}, & \text{} m=n,\ g=h,\\[0.6em] 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases} вҲӮlymвҲЈxgвҲӮПғnвҲЈh={(ymвҲ’ОјmвҲЈg)2вҲ’ПғmвҲЈg2ПғmвҲЈg3,m=n,g=h,0,otherwise. \frac{\partial l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \sigma_{n\mid h}} = \begin{cases} \dfrac{(y_m-\mu_{m\mid g})^{2}-\sigma_{m\mid g}^{2}}{\sigma_{m\mid g}^{3}}, & \text{} m=n,\ g=h,\\[0.6em] 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} Second-order derivatives: вҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮОјmвҲЈgвҲӮОјnвҲЈh={вҲ’1ПғmвҲЈg2,m=n,g=h,0,otherwise, \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \mu_{m\mid g}\, \partial \mu_{n\mid h}} = \begin{cases} -\dfrac{1}{\sigma_{m\mid g}^{2}}, & \text{} m=n,\ g=h,\\[0.6em] 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases} вҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮПғmвҲЈgвҲӮПғnвҲЈh={1ПғmвҲЈg2вҲ’3(ymвҲ’ОјmвҲЈg)2ПғmвҲЈg4,m=n,g=h,0,otherwise, \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \sigma_{m\mid g}\, \partial \sigma_{n\mid h}} = \begin{cases} \dfrac{1}{\sigma_{m\mid g}^{2}} - \dfrac{3(y_m-\mu_{m\mid g})^{2}}{\sigma_{m\mid g}^{4}}, & \text{} m=n,\ g=h,\\[1.0em] 0, & \text{otherwise,} \end{cases} вҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮОјmвҲЈgвҲӮПғnвҲЈh={вҲ’2(ymвҲ’ОјmвҲЈg)ПғmвҲЈg3,m=n,g=h,0,otherwise. \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \mu_{m\mid g}\, \partial \sigma_{n\mid h}} = \begin{cases} -\dfrac{2(y_m-\mu_{m\mid g})}{\sigma_{m\mid g}^{3}}, & \text{} m=n,\ g=h,\\[0.6em] 0, & \text{otherwise.} \end{cases} Consequently, Hessian conditional parameter following block form: Hess(lymвҲЈxg)=[вҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮОјmвҲЈgвҲӮОјnвҲЈhвҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮОјmвҲЈgвҲӮПғnвҲЈhвҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮПғnвҲЈhвҲӮОјmвҲЈgвҲӮ2lymвҲЈxgвҲӮПғmвҲЈgвҲӮПғnвҲЈh]. \mathrm{Hess}(l_{y_m \mid x_g}) \;=\; \begin{bmatrix} \displaystyle \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \mu_{m \mid g}\,\partial \mu_{n \mid h}} & \displaystyle \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \mu_{m \mid g}\,\partial \sigma_{n \mid h}} \\[0.6em] \displaystyle \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \sigma_{n \mid h}\,\partial \mu_{m \mid g}} & \displaystyle \frac{\partial^{2} l_{y_m \mid x_g}}{\partial \sigma_{m \mid g}\,\partial \sigma_{n \mid h}} \end{bmatrix}. Notice conditional parameter lymвҲЈxgl_{y_m \mid x_g} Hessian matrix.

text: continuous items, let ПҶ\varphi denote normal density. Let ОјmвҲЈg\mu_{m\mid g} ПғmвҲЈg\sigma_{m\mid g} mean standard deviation item mm class gg. P(ymвҲЈxg)=ПҶ(ym;ОјmвҲЈg,ПғmвҲЈg). title: Local Bivariate Residuals for Latent Class Analysis вҖ” lbvr
text: list class `"lbvr"` components: residual_matrix symmetric matrix residual measures: continuousвҖ“continuous pairs: Pearson correlation residuals. categoricalвҖ“categorical pairs: maximum absolute standardized residual. continuousвҖ“categorical pairs: maximum absolute ZвҖ‘score mean residuals per category. pvalue_matrix Symmetric matrix p-values corresponding     residual measures (using correlation test, chiвҖ‘square test, ANOVA FвҖ‘test). r_mat Symmetric matrix effect sizes comparable correlation: ContinuousвҖ“continuous: Pearson \(r\). CategoricalвҖ“categorical: difference CramГ©r's V (\(V_{obs} - V_{exp}\)). ContinuousвҖ“categorical: \(\eta\) (square root etaвҖ‘squared ANOVA). rmsr Root mean square upper triangle `r_mat`; global fit index. res_tab data frame one row per variable pair, containing:     pair, statistic (residual measure), p_value,     r (correlationвҖ‘like effect size), var_types,     test (descriptive label). table sorted absolute r.
